---
name: ATS support request
about: Request support for a new ATS platform
title: '[ats] '
labels: enhancement, ats
---

## ATS name

e.g. Teamtailor, SmartRecruiters, Workday, Recruitee…

## Example career page

A public URL where one can see the application form. **Do not link to your own in-progress application.**

## Form structure

Paste (or screenshot) the key fields as they appear on the form:

- First name / Last name / Full name
- Email / Phone
- LinkedIn / GitHub / Website
- Resume upload
- Cover letter (upload / textarea)
- Custom questions
- Consent / terms checkbox

## Public API

Does the ATS expose a public jobs API? If yes, paste the endpoint. If no, mention that scanning will need an agentic fallback.

## Notes

Any gotchas you noticed (React-only fields, autocomplete widgets, multi-step forms, aggregator redirects…).
